title: ProductionSetRequest
description: Schema for ProductionSetRequest in Nuix REST API

name.description: The name of the production set.

description.description: A description for the production set.

startingNumber.description: The first number used for document numbering.

query.description: Query items that should be included. If a query is not supplied it defaults to an empty string, which returns all items.

includeFamilies.description: If true, includes family items for the collection of items returned by the query. Default is false.

markupSets.description: Sets the given markup sets to be used during the export.

applyRedactions.description: If true, applies redactions in the markup sets. Default is true.

applyHighlights.description: If true, applies highlights in the markup sets. Default is true.

generatePdfStores.description: Generates print previews for the selected items in this production set. Default is false.

pdfStoresQuery.description: Query that identifies which production set items should have print previews generated. If a query is not supplied it defaults to an empty string, which returns all items.
